prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年该校在海南省综合类最低录取位次分别为约6546名、4773名、5489名、4681名（2023年因专业组断档出现36356名异常值，已排除）。近4年正常位次 区间4681–6546，2025年基准约4681名，较2024年（5489名）明显前移约800名，呈回升态势；该校在海南省综合类招生计划2021年17人、2022年15人、2023年17 人、2024年17人、2025年18人、2026年（招生计划文件）18人，2026年与2025年持平，无扩缩招变化，对竞争格局无直接影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 合肥工业大学（宣城校区）为教 育部直属211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年主榜第80位，近年排名稳定在80–83位区间，属中上游211层次；2026年高考周期声誉评价偏负面 ，主要涉及学术不端事件（学生盗用他人作品参赛、学术不端开除等）；2025年声誉亦偏负面（热门专业投档线暴跌）；抖音学校热度总排名第77位，评价"一般"，短视频曝光量 中等偏低。整体舆情偏负面，可能对报考热度产生一定抑制作用；合肥工业大学第五轮学科评估中管理科学与工程获评A级，为该校唯一A级学科；宣城校区招生 专业中经济学可关联管理科学与工程大类，电气工程与智能控制、机械工程、软件工程等工科专业依托校本部工科优势，学科基础扎实。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自 动化专业2024年社会热度为"高热推荐"，计算机/软件/人工智能类为"推荐"，机械/智能制造为"分化观望"，金融/财经/经济为"分化观望"。该校在海南招生专业以电气、软件、 机械等热门工科为主，整体专业热度偏正面。海南省2021–2025年综合类考生数持续增长（52977→55945→61728→65969→67408），2026年总考生数约78000（数据标记不确定），较2 025年增长约15.7%，竞争加剧。；该校位于安徽省宣城市，非海南省本地高校，无本地招生倾斜。university_enrollmen。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次4681名、2026年招生计划持平、海南省考生规模持续扩大（竞争加 剧）、学校声誉偏负面（抑制报考热情）、专业热度偏正面（电气/软件等热门工科吸引考生）等多因素，预计2026年位次在2025年基础上小幅前移（竞争略加剧）。预测最低录 取位次约4651名，区间4151–5151名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for this university in Hainan Province's comprehensive category were approximately 6546, 4773, 5489, and 4681 (the 2023 anomaly of 36356 due to a major group cutoff was excluded). Over the past 4 years, the normal ranking range was 4681–6546, with a 2025 baseline of approximately 4681, showing a clear upward shift of about 800 places compared to 2024 (5489). The enrollment plan for comprehensive category in Hainan Province was 17 in 2021, 15 in 2022, 17 in 2023, 17 in 2024, 18 in 2025, and 18 in 2026 (per enrollment plan documents), with 2026 remaining unchanged from 2025, indicating no expansion or contraction, thus no direct impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hefei University of Technology (Xuancheng Campus) is a directly affiliated 211 Project and Double First-Class university under the Ministry of Education. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranks 80th overall, with a stable range of 80–83 in recent years, placing it in the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is somewhat negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents (students plagiarizing others' works for competitions, academic dishonesty leading to expulsions, etc.). The 2025 reputation was also somewhat negative (sharp drop in admission cutoffs for popular majors). On Douyin, the university's overall popularity ranks 77th, with a rating of 'average' and moderately low short video exposure. Overall public opinion is somewhat negative, which may suppress application enthusiasm. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Hefei University of Technology's Management Science and Engineering was rated A, the only A-level discipline. Among the majors offered at the Xuancheng Campus, Economics can be linked to the broader Management Science and Engineering category, while engineering majors like Electrical Engineering and Intelligent Control, Mechanical Engineering, and Software Engineering rely on the main campus's strong engineering foundation, providing a solid disciplinary base.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the social popularity of Electrical Engineering and Automation was 'highly recommended', Computer/Software/Artificial Intelligence was 'recommended', Mechanical/Intelligent Manufacturing was 'differentiated and wait-and-see', and Finance/Economics was 'differentiated and wait-and-see'. The majors offered in Hainan are mainly popular engineering fields like Electrical, Software, and Mechanical, with overall major popularity leaning positive. From 2021 to 2025, the number of comprehensive category examinees in Hainan Province has been continuously increasing (52977→55945→61728→65969→67408), with the total number of examinees in 2026 estimated at about 78,000 (data marked as uncertain), representing an increase of about 15.7% compared to 2025, intensifying competition. The university is located in Xuancheng City, Anhui Province, not a local university in Hainan, so there is no local admission preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 4681, unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, continuous expansion of Hainan's examinee population (intensifying competition), somewhat negative university reputation (suppressing application enthusiasm), and somewhat positive major popularity (popular engineering majors like Electrical/Software attracting applicants), it is expected that the 2026 ranking will shift slightly upward from 2025 (with slightly intensified competition). The predicted minimum admission ranking is approximately 4651, with a range of 4151–5151.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Electrical Engineering and Intelligent Control
- Software Engineering
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 4151–5151, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 (Mechanical Engineering, Economics) as the main application direction, with Tier 1 (Electrical Engineering and Intelligent Control, Software Engineering) as a reach, and Tier 3 (English) as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (within 4151), you can prioritize reaching for Tier 1 popular engineering majors.
